bot.name: CEF x-sec bot
bot.subtitle: CEF 割安ロング/割高ショート cross-sectional (borrow gated)
bot.role: CEF cross-sectional discount LONG/SHORT — 2026-06-13 signal.py v2 simplified rewrite 完了。harness_ensemble.py 不在 (git 履歴空) のため path-dependent band-pick 経路を放棄、cef_nav CSV + _dailypricing.json から z-score 5y ranking のみで long/short basket 算出。turnover 抑制機構なし、long-leg のみ deploy 推奨、phase_ensemble は 1 sleeve fallback。入出力契約 (current_targets/current_targets_phase_ensemble) は維持、main.py/executor.py/borrow_probe.py 互換。検証は user PC で signal 動作確認後 dry→auto 昇格判断。

bot.name: Dispersion XS
bot.subtitle: DISPERSION_XS_SPREAD_V1 (high-disp regime XS reversal、dollar-neutral)
bot.role: DISPERSION_XS_SPREAD_V1 dollar-neutral cross-sectional reversal (paper-with-orders since 2026-06-09). regime z>=1.0 で fire、cache_1h 101 stocks 中 top 20% losers LONG / winners SHORT。market beta -0.12 (neutral)、OOS gross +62.8%/yr Sharpe 1.77 / HAC-t 1.22 / placebo p 0.121 (字義 PASS 未達、TIER_3 FLAG)。autopilot 2026-06-09T0044Z 採用、robustness 検証 0113Z 済。

bot.name: GLD USD Hedge
bot.subtitle: GLD bot の hedge overlay (UUP 常時保有、GLD pillar 50%×0.30=NetLiq 15%、drift 1pp rebalance)。単独保有意味なし、必ず GLD と組み合わせ
bot.role: GLD_USD_HEDGE_V1 paper observation (always-on static UUP overlay、no signal gate、target 15% of NetLiq (2026-06-13 user 確認: 15% 採用継続、06-10 10倍化済)、drift 1pp rebalance). autopilot 6 round (2026-06-09T2257Z..0050Z) で deploy-form 完全確定: vehicle=UUP / sizing=static H=0.30 / no timing trigger。残 deploy gate (live UUP L1 spread / forward OOS) を paper 観察で消化する位置づけ。composite Sharpe FULL 1.142 (vs noHedge 1.151)、stress 2021-23 で +0.055 hedge value、GLD corr -0.40。TIER_3 据置、deploy-form は最終確定。

bot.name: XLF Friday-Down h1
bot.subtitle: XLF 金曜 close 1d return <= -1.5% → 月曜寄付 MOO BUY → 火曜寄付 MOO SELL (1営業日 hold)。autopilot 2026-06-12T1507Z で TIER_3 FLAG 正式化、cost gate PASS。
bot.role: XLF_DIRECT_FRI_COSTGATE_V1 paper observation (XLF Friday 1d return <= -1.5% → 翌営業日 Mon 寄付 MOO BUY → 翌々営業日 Tue 寄付 MOO SELL). autopilot 2026-06-12T1507Z で TIER_3 FLAG 正式化、cost gate PASS (gross OOS +1.29%/trade, resid +0.22%, breakeven 片道 66bp / 実 spread 0.5-1bp で 130x 余裕). sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-12 paper 配備承認。daily phase で signal compute → 月曜寄付 MOO BUY / 火曜寄付 MOO SELL を auto fire。

bot.name: Insider bot
bot.subtitle: CFO単独インサイダー買い basket (filing+1寄り/3日hold)
bot.role: Insider CFO solo P-buy basket (INSU_CFO_SOLO_H3). 2026-06-13 user test PASS: signal 動作確認、CFO solo filter (value>=$50k, prior30d>=-0.1, lookback=3d) で NO SIGNAL も正常 path 通過。pickle dtype 問題は user pandas upgrade で解消。daily 経路 dry: form4 ingest + signal eval + 候補 print、broker 接続なし。paper-with-orders 化は user broker_config.allow_live_orders 承認後 (現 false で出荷)。

bot.name: J1 仕手 fade watch
bot.subtitle: JP 株 watchlist の 5d c2c return >= +50% を毎朝監視。FIRE 検出時 alerts.csv 記録。IBKR JP short 不可前提のため発注なし、user 通知のみ。watch: 4424/6085/7746/7999/6217

stats.placebo: edge 減衰中 → watch のみ

bot.role: J1 仕手 fade watchlist 監視 (observation only, no broker, no orders). user 指定 5 銘柄 (4424.T/6085.T/7746.T/7999.T/6217.T) を毎朝 daily_auto で yfinance fetch、5d c2c return >= 50% で FIRE alert、>=30% で WARN。発火時 logs/j1_alerts.csv + state.json 更新、PWA に push。IBKR JP short 不可前提のため発注なし。J1 robustness 減衰中 (last 12mo Sh 0.68) のため deploy ではなく user watch 用 surface。

bot.name: Earnings Post-Surprise
bot.subtitle: EPS surprise ≥ +10% → T+1 寄付 BUY → T+5 close SELL。LLY Sh 14.5 win 89%、NVDA Sh 7.5。yfinance で earnings date + surprise を毎朝チェック、days_since==1 で発動
bot.role: #4-1 earnings post-surprise momentum (paper). H3 rule: EPS surprise >= 10% → T+1 寄付 BUY → T+5 close SELL. backtest LLY Sharpe 14.5 win 89% mean +3.33% / NVDA Sh 7.5. watchlist: LLY/NVDA (H3) + LLY/PWR baseline (opt). sleeve 5% NetLiq、max 3 concurrent. yfinance Ticker.get_earnings_dates で surprise 取得、days_since==1 で entry fire、state.consumed_earnings で同 earnings の重複消費を抑制。user 2026-06-13 #4-1 deploy 承認。

bot.name: Intraday bot
bot.subtitle: 分足 reversion (K_5m SMH N3 / QQQ N3 highvol、 MACD-ride exit)
bot.role: K_5m_SMH / QQQ / E4 intraday reversion (BUILD-IN-PROGRESS). Auto-skipped until built.

bot.name: Breadth XS
bot.subtitle: BREADTH_XS_SPREAD_V1 (washout day XS reversal、observation overlay of dispersion_xs)
bot.role: BREADTH_XS_SPREAD_V1 paper observation (washout regime + dollar-neutral XS-reversal、breadth_z<=-1.0 で fire、top 10% loser LONG / winner SHORT、sleeve 2.5%). dispersion_xs と同一 edge 軸 (交互作用 t+0.58 null) のため独立 deploy 計上はせず paper 観察用 (PAPER-with-orders since 2026-06-09). edge は real selection α (ex-ante β hedge HAC-t +3.14 placebo 0.0002) ただし +0.64 net-long-beta tilt。autopilot 0157Z 採用、beta-source 弁別 0258Z 済。

bot.name: XLK Drop5d h1
bot.subtitle: XLK 5d c2c return <= -5% → 翌寄付 BUY → 翌々寄付 SELL (h1 LONG only). autopilot 2026-06-12 TIER_3 FLAG (raw cell)、XLF cell との同時 fire 時は panic_cap で entry skip
bot.role: XLK_DROP5D_COSTGATE_V1 paper observation (XLK 5d c2c return <= -5% → 翌営業日寄付 MOO BUY → 翌々営業日寄付 MOO SELL, LONG only h1). autopilot 2026-06-12T1518Z TIER_3 FLAG raw cell 正式化 (XLF より半 notch 下、resid 有意性 matched control のみ、β 成分 68-79%). typical cost (片道 7.5bp): net OOS raw +1.130%/trade oSh 5.33 NW-t 2.77. trigger 頻度 9.6/年 (XLF Fri cell の約 2 倍). XLF 重複 11 日 raw corr +0.821、panic_cap で XLF position 存在時 entry skip。sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-13 paper 配備承認。

cards.text: autopilot ON: per-bot broker_config が live の bot のみ実発注。
